---
description: Documentation-only changes (docstrings, README, comments)
---

Follow the workflow in [docs/workflows/docs.md](../../docs/workflows/docs.md).

**Use when:** Updating docstrings, README/docs, or code comments.

**Key principle:** Focus on explaining "why" (rationale) rather than just "what" (implementation).

**Output format:**
- Propose documentation changes
- If Python files touched, confirm formatting passes
- Show that docs are consistent with code behavior
